I'm originally from Seattle and currently pursuing my M.S. in Business Analytics at Cal Poly SLO. I've always been drawn to people and relationships, and over time that naturally extended to data. I love finding patterns, asking questions, and turning numbers into something meaningful. With AI and technology reshaping nearly every industry, I'm focused on being someone who actually knows how to use these tools to drive real change.

Selected Projects

Industry Project · NVIDIA

Developer Engagement Analytics Framework

Built an analytics framework to evaluate developer engagement, uncover adoption patterns, and identify high-value user segments from platform activity data.

  • Analyzed developer contacts, activities, and SDK downloads using Python and SQL to uncover key drivers of platform usage
  • Built cohort segmentation models to identify high value developers and measure the impact of training assets on retention and activity
  • Designed a repeatable analytics framework and delivered recommendations to NVIDIA’s BI team to support strategic decision-making
PythonSQLSegmentationAnalytics FrameworkBI
Industry Project · Oracle

Customer Churn Prediction Model

Industry collaboration with Oracle to build ML models that identify at-risk accounts for proactive retention.

  • Extracted churn signals from engagement and transactional data
  • Deployed models on Oracle Fusion Data Intelligence platform
  • Translated outputs into targeted retention recommendations
PythonSQLOracle FDIChurn Modeling
IBM Data Science Capstone

SpaceX Falcon 9 Landing Prediction

End-to-end ML pipeline to predict Falcon 9 first-stage booster landing outcomes — from data engineering through model training and interactive visualization.

  • Built data pipelines via Python, SQL, and REST APIs
  • Trained Decision Tree + Logistic Regression classifiers
  • Deployed interactive dashboards with Plotly Dash and Folium
PythonSQLREST APIScikit-learnPlotly DashFolium
Predictive Modeling · R

COVID-19 Symptom & Clustering Analysis

Supervised and unsupervised ML on large-scale COVID-19 data to identify symptom, demographic, and exposure predictors.

  • Logistic regression in R to surface predictive indicators
  • K-means clustering to segment distinct population groups
  • Feature engineering across symptoms and demographics
RLogistic RegressionK-MeansFeature Engineering
Personal Project · Data Engineering

Data is Delicious — Meal Plan Scraper & Nutrition Analysis

End-to-end data pipeline combining web scraping and API integration to collect, enrich, and analyze weekly meal plan nutrition data.

  • Scraped weekly meal plan data from unstructured web pages using Python, extracting recipe names, links, and prices into a structured table
  • Queried the Tasty API to match scraped recipes and retrieve detailed nutrition information; automated the full pipeline in a reusable function
  • Applied fuzzy matching to classify recipes as vegetarian or non-vegetarian based on ingredient keywords
  • Built a nutrition visualization across the week highlighting calorie distribution and vegetarian meals
PythonWeb ScrapingREST APIFuzzy MatchingData Visualization
Personal Project · Regularization & Variable Selection

MLB Player Salary Prediction

Compared regularization techniques to predict MLB player salaries from 1986 career statistics, evaluating feature sets and model performance via cross-validation.

  • Built and compared four regression pipelines — OLS, Ridge, LASSO, and Elastic Net — with standardized features and cross-validated hyperparameter tuning
  • Performed variable selection across three feature sets (top 1, top 5, and top 5 with categorical interactions), re-tuning regularization for each
  • Evaluated all model and feature combinations using MSE; identified the best-performing pipeline via cross-validation
  • Interpreted coefficient paths to compare shrinkage behavior across Ridge and LASSO
PythonScikit-learnRidgeLASSOElastic NetCross-Validation
